   113→export const PostMetaBarInternal: Component = ({ className }) => {
   114→  const meta = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => {
   115→    if (!data) return
   116→    return {
   117→      created: data.created,
   118→      category: data.category,
   119→      tags: data.tags,
   120→      count: data.count,
   121→      modified: data.modified,
   122→      aiGen: data.meta?.aiGen,
   123→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations as
   124→        | string[]
   125→        | undefined,
   126→      translationMeta: data.translationMeta,
   127→    }
   128→  })
   129→
   130→  if (!meta) return null
   131→  return (
   132→    <PostMetaBar className={className} meta={meta}>
   133→      <CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem />
   134→      <AIGenBadge value={meta.aiGen} />
   135→      <TranslationLanguageSwitcher
   136→        availableTranslations={meta.availableTranslations}
   137→        sourceLang={meta.translationMeta?.sourceLang}
   138→      />
   139→    </PostMetaBar>
   140→  )
   141→}
   142→
   143→export const PostDataReValidate: FC<{
   144→  fetchedAt: string
   145→}> = withClientOnly(({ fetchedAt }) => {
   146→  const isOutdated = useMemo(
   147→    () =>
   148→      Date.now() - new Date(fetchedAt).getTime() > appStaticConfig.revalidate,
   149→    [fetchedAt],
   150→  )
   151→  const dataSetter = useSetCurrentPostData()
   152→
   153→  const locale = useLocale()
   154→
   155→  const { category, slug } = useCurrentPostDataSelector((post) => {
   156→    if (!post) return {}
   157→    return {
   158→      category: post.category,
   159→      slug: post.slug,
   160→    }
   161→  })
   162→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   163→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   164→  useEffect(() => {
   165→    if (onceRef.current) return
   166→
   167→    onceRef.current = true
   168→    if (!isOutdated) return
   169→
   170→    if (!category || !slug) return
   171→
   172→    queryClient
   173→      .fetchQuery(queries.post.bySlug(category.slug, slug, locale))
   174→      .then((data) => {
   175→        dataSetter(data as PostWithTranslation)
   176→        // toast.info('此文章访问的内容已过期，所以页面数据自动更新了。')
   177→        logger.log('Post data revalidated', data)
   178→      })
   179→  }, [category, dataSetter, isOutdated, locale, queryClient, slug])
   180→  return null
   181→})
   182→
   183→export const SlugReplacer = ({ to }: { to: string }) => {
   184→  const router = useRouter()
   185→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   186→
   187→  if (!onceRef.current) {
   188→    onceRef.current = true
   189→    router.replace(to)
   190→  }
   191→
   192→  return null
   193→}
   194→
   195→export const PostNoticeCard = () => {
   196→  const t = useTranslations('post')
   197→  const data = useCurrentPostDataSelector((s) => {
   198→    if (!s) return null
   199→    return {
   200→      id: s.id,
   201→      modified: s.modified,
   202→      isTranslated: s.isTranslated,
   203→      translationMeta: s.translationMeta,
   204→      summary: s.summary || '',
   205→      related: s.related,
   206→    }
   207→  })
   208→
   209→  if (!data) return null
   210→
   211→  const { id, modified, isTranslated, translationMeta, summary, related } = data
   212→  const isOutdated = modified
   213→    ? differenceInDays(new Date(), new Date(modified)) > 60
   214→    : false
   215→
   216→  return (
   217→    <NoticeCard className="my-8">
   218→      {isOutdated && modified && (
   219→        <NoticeCardItem>
   220→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5">
   221→            <span className="opacity-90">
   222→              <i className="i-mingcute-warning-line text-base" />
   223→            </span>
   224→            <span>
   225→              {t('outdated_prefix')}
   226→              <RelativeTime date={modified} />
   227→              {t('outdated_suffix')}
   228→            </span>
   229→          </div>
   230→        </NoticeCardItem>
   231→      )}
   232→      {related && related.length > 0 && (
   233→        <NoticeCardItem>
   234→          <div
   235→            data-hide-print
   236→            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5"
   237→          >
   238→            <span className="opacity-90">
   239→              <i className="i-mingcute-link-2-line text-base" />
   240→            </span>
   241→            <span>{t('related_before')}</span>
   242→          </div>
   243→          <div className="mt-1.5 space-y-1.5 pl-[calc(1rem+8px)]">
   244→            {related.map((post) => {
   245→              const href = `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`
   246→              return (
   247→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5" key={href}>
   248→                  <span className="text-neutral-4">
   249→                    <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-line text-sm" />
   250→                  </span>
   251→                  <PeekLink
   252→                    className="text-sm text-neutral-7 transition-colors hover:text-accent"
   253→                    href={href}
   254→                  >
   255→                    {post.title}
   256→                  </PeekLink>
   257→                </div>
   258→              )
   259→            })}
   260→          </div>
   261→        </NoticeCardItem>
   262→      )}
   263→      {isTranslated && translationMeta && (
   264→        <NoticeCardItem>
   265→          <TranslationNoticeContent translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   266→        </NoticeCardItem>
   267→      )}
   268→      <NoticeCardItem variant="summary">
   269→        <SummarySwitcher articleId={id!} summary={summary} variant="inline" />
   270→      </NoticeCardItem>
   271→    </NoticeCard>
   272→  )
   273→}
   274→

    20→import { WrappedElementProvider } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    21→import type { PostWithTranslation } from '~/queries/definition'
    22→import { queries } from '~/queries/definition'
    23→
    24→import { PostOutdate } from '../post'
    25→
    26→interface PostPreviewProps {
    27→  category: string
    28→  slug: string
    29→}
    30→export const PostPreview: FC<PostPreviewProps> = (props) => {
    31→  const { category, slug } = props
    32→  const { data, isLoading } = useQuery({
    33→    ...queries.post.bySlug(category, slug),
    34→  })
    35→
    36→  const overrideAtom = useMemo(() => atom(null! as PostWithTranslation), [])
    37→  if (isLoading) return <Loading useDefaultLoadingText className="w-full" />
    38→  if (!data) return null
    39→  const postData = data as PostWithTranslation
    40→  return (
    41→    <CurrentPostDataAtomProvider overrideAtom={overrideAtom}>
    42→      <CurrentPostDataProvider data={postData} />
    43→      {!!postData.id && <AckRead id={postData.id} type="post" />}
    44→      <BottomToUpSmoothTransitionView>
    45→        <Paper>
    46→          <article
    47→            className={clsx(
    48→              'relative w-full min-w-0',
    49→              postData.contentFormat !== 'lexical' && 'prose',
    50→            )}
    51→          >
    52→            <header className="mb-8">
    53→              <h1 className="mt-8 text-balance text-center">
    54→                {postData.title}
    55→              </h1>
    56→              <PostMetaBarInternal className="mb-8 justify-center" />
    57→
    58→              <PostOutdate />
    59→            </header>
    60→            <WrappedElementProvider eoaDetect>
    61→              <PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
    62→                <PostMarkdown />
    63→              </PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
    64→            </WrappedElementProvider>
    65→          </article>
    66→        </Paper>
    67→      </BottomToUpSmoothTransitionView>
    68→    </CurrentPostDataAtomProvider>
    69→  )
    70→}
    71→
```

善。今审 `pageExtra.tsx` 中可改进之处。

发现以下可优化之处：

1. `PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider` 中 `images` 有双重 fallback（`data?.images || noopArr` 后又 `images || noopArr`），冗余。
2. `PostNoticeCard` 中 `data.id` 传至 `SummarySwitcher` 时用 `id!`，然 `data` 已经过 null check，`id` 必有值，非空断言多余可移除（但须确认类型）。
3. `SlugReplacer` 在 render 中执行副作用（`router.replace`），应移至 `useEffect`。
4. 注释 `// toast.info(...)` 已无用，可删。

先确认 `Component` 类型之来源。

   114→  const meta = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => {
   115→    if (!data) return
   116→    return {
   117→      created: data.created,
   118→      category: data.category,
   119→      tags: data.tags,
   120→      count: data.count,
   121→      modified: data.modified,
   122→      aiGen: data.meta?.aiGen,
   123→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations as
   124→        | string[]
   125→        | undefined,
   126→      translationMeta: data.translationMeta,
   127→    }
   128→  })
   129→
   130→  if (!meta) return null
   131→  return (
   132→    <PostMetaBar className={className} meta={meta}>
   133→      <CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem />
   134→      <AIGenBadge value={meta.aiGen} />

   136→        availableTranslations={meta.availableTranslations}

   138→      />
   139→    </PostMetaBar>

   141→}
   142→
   143→export const PostDataReValidate: FC<{
   144→  fetchedAt: string
   145→}> = withClientOnly(({ fetchedAt }) => {
   146→  const isOutdated = useMemo(
   147→    () =>
   148→      Date.now() - new Date(fetchedAt).getTime() > appStaticConfig.revalidate,
   149→    [fetchedAt],
   150→  )
   151→  const dataSetter = useSetCurrentPostData()
   152→
   153→  const locale = useLocale()
   154→
   155→  const { category, slug } = useCurrentPostDataSelector((post) => {
   156→    if (!post) return {}
   157→    return {
   158→      category: post.category,
   159→      slug: post.slug,
   160→    }
   161→  })
   162→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   163→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   164→  useEffect(() => {
   165→    if (onceRef.current) return
   166→
   167→    onceRef.current = true
   168→    if (!isOutdated) return
   169→
   170→    if (!category || !slug) return
   171→
   172→    queryClient
   173→      .fetchQuery(queries.post.bySlug(category.slug, slug, locale))
   174→      .then((data) => {
   175→        dataSetter(data as PostWithTranslation)
   176→        logger.log('Post data revalidated', data)
   177→      })
   178→  }, [category, dataSetter, isOutdated, locale, queryClient, slug])
   179→  return null
   180→})
   181→
   182→export const SlugReplacer = ({ to }: { to: string }) => {
   183→  const router = useRouter()
   184→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   185→
   186→  useEffect(() => {
   187→    if (onceRef.current) return
   188→    onceRef.current = true
   189→    router.replace(to)
   190→  }, [router, to])
   191→
   192→  return null
   193→}
   194→
   195→export const PostNoticeCard = () => {
   196→  const t = useTranslations('post')
   197→  const data = useCurrentPostDataSelector((s) => {
   198→    if (!s) return null
   199→    return {
   200→      id: s.id,
   201→      modified: s.modified,
   202→      isTranslated: s.isTranslated,
   203→      translationMeta: s.translationMeta,
   204→      summary: s.summary || '',
   205→      related: s.related,
   206→    }
   207→  })
   208→
   209→  if (!data) return null
   210→
   211→  const { id, modified, isTranslated, translationMeta, summary, related } = data
   212→  const isOutdated = modified
   213→    ? differenceInDays(new Date(), new Date(modified)) > 60
   214→    : false
   215→
   216→  return (
   217→    <NoticeCard className="my-8">
   218→      {isOutdated && modified && (
   219→        <NoticeCardItem>
   220→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5">
   221→            <span className="opacity-90">
   222→              <i className="i-mingcute-warning-line text-base" />
   223→            </span>
   224→            <span>
   225→              {t('outdated_prefix')}
   226→              <RelativeTime date={modified} />
   227→              {t('outdated_suffix')}
   228→            </span>
   229→          </div>
   230→        </NoticeCardItem>
   231→      )}
   232→      {related && related.length > 0 && (
   233→        <NoticeCardItem>
   234→          <div
   235→            data-hide-print
   236→            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5"
   237→          >
   238→            <span className="opacity-90">
   239→              <i className="i-mingcute-link-2-line text-base" />
   240→            </span>
   241→            <span>{t('related_before')}</span>
   242→          </div>
   243→          <div className="mt-1.5 space-y-1.5 pl-[calc(1rem+8px)]">
   244→            {related.map((post) => {
   245→              const href = `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`
   246→              return (
   247→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5" key={href}>
   248→                  <span className="text-neutral-4">
   249→                    <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-line text-sm" />
   250→                  </span>
   251→                  <PeekLink
   252→                    className="text-sm text-neutral-7 transition-colors hover:text-accent"
   253→                    href={href}
   254→                  >
   255→                    {post.title}
   256→                  </PeekLink>
   257→                </div>
   258→              )
   259→            })}
   260→          </div>
   261→        </NoticeCardItem>
   262→      )}
   263→      {isTranslated && translationMeta && (
   264→        <NoticeCardItem>
   265→          <TranslationNoticeContent translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   266→        </NoticeCardItem>
   267→      )}
   268→      <NoticeCardItem variant="summary">
   269→        <SummarySwitcher articleId={id!} summary={summary} variant="inline" />
   270→      </NoticeCardItem>
   271→    </NoticeCard>
   272→  )
   273→}
   274→

    24→import { WithArticleSelectionAction } from '~/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction'
    25→import { TranslationLanguageSwitcher } from '~/components/modules/translation/TranslationLanguageSwitcher'
    26→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    27→import { useRouter } from '~/i18n/navigation'
    28→import { logger } from '~/lib/logger'
    29→import { noopArr } from '~/lib/noop'
    30→import { MarkdownImageRecordProvider } from '~/providers/article/MarkdownImageRecordProvider'
    31→import {
    32→  useCurrentPostDataSelector,
    33→  useSetCurrentPostData,
    34→} from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'
    35→import { useAggregationSelector } from '~/providers/root/aggregation-data-provider'
    36→import type { PostWithTranslation } from '~/queries/definition'
    37→import { queries } from '~/queries/definition'
    38→
    39→export const LdJsonWithAuthor = ({
    40→  baseLdJson,
    41→}: {
    42→  baseLdJson: WithContext<BlogPosting>
    43→}) => {
    44→  const jsonLd = useAggregationSelector(
    45→    (state) =>
    46→      ({
    47→        ...baseLdJson,
    48→        author: {
    49→          '@type': 'Person',
    50→          name: state.user.name,
    51→          url: state.url.webUrl,
    52→        },
    53→      }) as WithContext<BlogPosting>,
    54→  )
    55→  return (
    56→    <script
    57→      type="application/ld+json"
    58→      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
    59→        __html: JSON.stringify(jsonLd),
    60→      }}
    61→    />
    62→  )
    63→}
    64→export const PostTitle = () => {
    65→  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
    66→
    67→  return (
    68→    <h1 className="mb-8 text-balance text-center text-4xl font-bold leading-tight">
    69→      {title}
    70→    </h1>
    71→  )
    72→}
    73→export const MarkdownSelection: Component = (props) => {
    74→  const id = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.id)!
    75→  const title = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.title)!
    76→  const allowComment = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.allowComment)!
    77→  const contentFormat = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
    78→    (data) => data?.contentFormat,
    79→  )
    80→  const content = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.content)
    81→  const translationLang = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) =>
    82→    data?.isTranslated ? data.translationMeta?.targetLang : null,
    83→  )
    84→  return (
    85→    <WithArticleSelectionAction
    86→      canComment={allowComment}
    87→      content={contentFormat === 'lexical' ? (content ?? undefined) : undefined}
    88→      contentFormat={contentFormat}
    89→      refId={id}
    90→      title={title}
    91→      translationLang={translationLang}
    92→    >
    93→      {props.children}
    94→    </WithArticleSelectionAction>
    95→  )
    96→}
    97→export const FocusReadingEffect = () => {
    98→  useFocusReading()
    99→  return null
   100→}
   101→
   102→export const PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   103→  const images = useCurrentPostDataSelector(
   104→    (data) => data?.images ?? (noopArr as Image[]),
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  return (
   108→    <MarkdownImageRecordProvider images={images}>
   109→      {props.children}
   110→    </MarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   111→  )
   112→}
   113→export const PostMetaBarInternal: Component = ({ className }) => {
   114→  const meta = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => {
   115→    if (!data) return
   116→    return {
   117→      created: data.created,
   118→      category: data.category,
   119→      tags: data.tags,
   120→      count: data.count,
   121→      modified: data.modified,
   122→      aiGen: data.meta?.aiGen,
   123→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations as
   124→        | string[]
   125→        | undefined,
   126→      translationMeta: data.translationMeta,
   127→    }
   128→  })
   129→
   130→  if (!meta) return null
   131→  return (
   132→    <PostMetaBar className={className} meta={meta}>
   133→      <CurrentReadingCountingMetaBarItem />
   134→      <AIGenBadge value={meta.aiGen} />
   135→      <TranslationLanguageSwitcher
   136→        availableTranslations={meta.availableTranslations}
   137→        sourceLang={meta.translationMeta?.sourceLang}
   138→      />
   139→    </PostMetaBar>
   140→  )
   141→}
   142→
   143→export const PostDataReValidate: FC<{
   144→  fetchedAt: string
   145→}> = withClientOnly(({ fetchedAt }) => {
   146→  const isOutdated = useMemo(
   147→    () =>
   148→      Date.now() - new Date(fetchedAt).getTime() > appStaticConfig.revalidate,
   149→    [fetchedAt],
   150→  )
   151→  const dataSetter = useSetCurrentPostData()
   152→
   153→  const locale = useLocale()
   154→
   155→  const { category, slug } = useCurrentPostDataSelector((post) => {
   156→    if (!post) return {}
   157→    return {
   158→      category: post.category,
   159→      slug: post.slug,
   160→    }
   161→  })
   162→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   163→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
   164→  useEffect(() => {
   165→    if (onceRef.current) return
   166→
   167→    onceRef.current = true
   168→    if (!isOutdated) return
   169→
   170→    if (!category || !slug) return
   171→
   172→    queryClient
   173→      .fetchQuery(queries.post.bySlug(category.slug, slug, locale))
   174→      .then((data) => {
   175→        dataSetter(data as PostWithTranslation)
   176→        logger.log('Post data revalidated', data)
   177→      })
   178→  }, [category, dataSetter, isOutdated, locale, queryClient, slug])
   179→  return null
   180→})
   181→
   182→export const SlugReplacer = ({ to }: { to: string }) => {
   183→  const router = useRouter()
   184→  const onceRef = useRef(false)
   185→
   186→  useEffect(() => {
   187→    if (onceRef.current) return
   188→    onceRef.current = true
   189→    router.replace(to)
   190→  }, [router, to])
   191→
   192→  return null
   193→}
   194→
   195→export const PostNoticeCard = () => {
   196→  const t = useTranslations('post')
   197→  const data = useCurrentPostDataSelector((s) => {
   198→    if (!s) return null
   199→    return {
   200→      id: s.id,
   201→      modified: s.modified,
   202→      isTranslated: s.isTranslated,
   203→      translationMeta: s.translationMeta,
   204→      summary: s.summary || '',
   205→      related: s.related,
   206→    }
   207→  })
   208→
   209→  if (!data) return null
   210→
   211→  const { id, modified, isTranslated, translationMeta, summary, related } = data
   212→  const isOutdated = modified
   213→    ? differenceInDays(new Date(), new Date(modified)) > 60
   214→    : false
   215→
   216→  return (
   217→    <NoticeCard className="my-8">
   218→      {isOutdated && modified && (
   219→        <NoticeCardItem>
   220→          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5">
   221→            <span className="opacity-90">
   222→              <i className="i-mingcute-warning-line text-base" />
   223→            </span>
   224→            <span>
   225→              {t('outdated_prefix')}
   226→              <RelativeTime date={modified} />
   227→              {t('outdated_suffix')}
   228→            </span>
   229→          </div>
   230→        </NoticeCardItem>
   231→      )}
   232→      {related && related.length > 0 && (
   233→        <NoticeCardItem>
   234→          <div
   235→            data-hide-print
   236→            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-neutral-5"
   237→          >
   238→            <span className="opacity-90">
   239→              <i className="i-mingcute-link-2-line text-base" />
   240→            </span>
   241→            <span>{t('related_before')}</span>
   242→          </div>
   243→          <div className="mt-1.5 space-y-1.5 pl-[calc(1rem+8px)]">
   244→            {related.map((post) => {
   245→              const href = `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`
   246→              return (
   247→                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5" key={href}>
   248→                  <span className="text-neutral-4">
   249→                    <i className="i-mingcute-arrow-right-line text-sm" />
   250→                  </span>
   251→                  <PeekLink
   252→                    className="text-sm text-neutral-7 transition-colors hover:text-accent"
   253→                    href={href}
   254→                  >
   255→                    {post.title}
   256→                  </PeekLink>
   257→                </div>
   258→              )
   259→            })}
   260→          </div>
   261→        </NoticeCardItem>
   262→      )}
   263→      {isTranslated && translationMeta && (
   264→        <NoticeCardItem>
   265→          <TranslationNoticeContent translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   266→        </NoticeCardItem>
   267→      )}
   268→      <NoticeCardItem variant="summary">
   269→        <SummarySwitcher articleId={id!} summary={summary} variant="inline" />
   270→      </NoticeCardItem>
   271→    </NoticeCard>
   272→  )
   273→}
   274→
```
</details></tool-use>
